findings.resolution: Expected witness projections are literal adapter records and no longer delegate to observed replay.

Fixer pass routes observed qRoute evidence through BattleEntrypointTrace events emitted by production reducer observer entrypoints; expected qRoute construction remains independent literal ReducerRouteEvent records.
Runtime dispatch uses WeaponMasteryProperty, DragonbornBreathWeaponFacts, and InnateSorcerySpellFacts rather than selected feature or catalog names.
Persistent feature_substrates omit HP, prone, action_available, and bonus_action_available; projections derive those from Combatant and BattleState action-economy owners.

rounds.summary: Fixer pass moved observed route evidence from adapter-local route constructors to production reducer observer traces, verified RAW references for mastery properties, Dragonborn Breath Weapon, Innate Sorcery, and spell save/attack terminology, and confirmed no runtime branch dispatches on authored selected identity.

Convergence pass found no remaining reasonable findings. The remaining strong connascence is localized to literal expected route witnesses that intentionally assert the reducer-observed entrypoint route contract.
